title: tomophyllum hayatae
intro: Tomophyllum hayatae, also known as Hayata's fern, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae, native to Taiwan. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tomophyllum hayatae include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. Tomophyllum hayatae can be prepared into herbal tea, infusion, or extract, and is also used in traditional Taiwanese medicine to treat various ailments.
